evidence_summary: Execute a high-stakes tactical infiltration sequence where John Carter leads a Thark unit in scaling the carborundum walls of Zodanga. The scene requires precise coordination of physical stunts involving human ladders and leather straps to facilitate entry...

After a ten-day march, the Thark army reaches Zodanga. John Carter leads a stealthy infiltration, scaling the carborundum walls using human ladders and leather straps to enter the palace grounds and prepare the gates for the main attack.
